settings.title: Quality you can taste, hygiene you can trust

settings.editor: Since 2014, Meridien Foods has been the preferred supplier for hotels, restaurants, caterers, and retail stores across South India. Every cut is processed in our FSSAI-certified facility and cold-chain handled from source to your kitchen.
